foodFuturesLagReport.notes: No fitted ridge profiles are reported until live or cached futures histories are available; USDA food feeds remain primary.

derived.gasolineEiaDriver: EIA weekly regular gasoline calendar-month average $3.816/gal vs prior $4.050/gal using 2 weekly prints
derived.dieselEiaDriver: EIA weekly U.S. No. 2 diesel retail calendar-month average $4.687/gal vs prior $5.024/gal using 2 weekly prints
derived.heatingOilEiaDriver: EIA New York Harbor No. 2 heating oil spot calendar-month average $3.138/gal vs prior $3.302/gal using 3 daily prints
derived.jetFuelEiaDriver: EIA Gulf Coast jet fuel calendar-month average $2.767/gal vs prior $3.042/gal using 3 daily prints
derived.shelterMarketDriver: lagged external shelter overlay (2025-01 to 2026-01): Zillow ZORI 0.17% avg m/m over 13 lagged obs; Apartment List -0.11% avg m/m over 13 lagged obs; BLS/Cleveland Fed NTRI 0.98% avg m/m over 3 lagged obs
